contracts.purpose: Master development contract for all agents
key_rules: Before making ANY changes, read FEATURES.md and docs/jd-agent-prd.md
After implementing ANY feature/enhancement/fix, update FEATURES.md
After implementing ANY feature/enhancement/fix, update the documentation system
When creating new apps/agents, create comprehensive documentation
Code must use TypeScript strict mode
Follow existing patterns in codebase
All API endpoints must have proper error handling
Use Zod for all input validation
Keep services focused (single responsibility)
Track sources for all data
Run tests after implementing changes
Verify health endpoint works
Test changes manually via API endpoints or UI
Feature documentation is mandatory
Update FEATURES.md with changelog entry
For new apps: create /docs/public/features/{app-name}/index.md
Documentation must be user-focused
Documentation formatting: H2 sections, Last updated, tables, code blocks
A feature is NOT complete until documentation is complete
contracts.applies_to: All agents working on JD Agent codebase

key_rules: Test everything - Run verification script after each task
Fix before moving on - If something breaks, fix immediately
Demo to user - After completing each section, provide demo
Be thorough - Check edge cases, handle errors gracefully
Ask if stuck - Ask user rather than guessing
Strict implementation order required (8 steps)
Do NOT proceed if tests fail
Do NOT skip checkpoint verification
Demo format required: What Was Built, Test Results, Demo Commands
If something breaks: Stop → Identify → Fix → Re-run → Verify → Continue
Must verify environment setup before starting
Checkpoint verification at each phase

contracts.purpose: Single source of truth for all system features
key_rules: This is the single source of truth for all current features
All agents MUST consult this document before making changes
All agents MUST update this document after implementing new features
Update instructions: Add/modify section, add changelog entry, update Last Updated
Architecture is Monorepo: Hub + Command Center, Tasks, Vault, Jobs apps
Task system uses GTD methodology
All features documented with: current status, implementation details, API endpoints
Changelog section at bottom must be updated with every change
Document format: Markdown with H1/H2/H3 hierarchy

gaps: No explicit rules about code review process
No explicit rules about dependency management/updates
